name: senpi-dev
onCreateCommand: bash -lc 'sudo apt-get update -y && sudo apt-get install -y tmux ripgrep jq || true'

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic Claude API key. Seeds .env.local and powers real agent turns. Mock-loop QA needs no key (it uses a local fake model).

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: (Optional) Google Gemini API key (senpi's default provider is google).
